_comment_1: Copy this file to dart_defines.json (already gitignored).
_comment_app_token: Set APP_TRANSLATE_TOKEN to the same value as APP_SHARED_SECRET in /etc/interact/translate.env on the proxy box. See server/translate-proxy/secrets.local.md.
_comment_vision: Vision LLM model name on DeepSeek. Override if your account uses a different SKU (e.g. deepseek-vl-7b-chat). Used by lib/features/vision/.
_comment_auth: Base URL of the auth / sync / admin API. Defaults to pro.interactpak.com — the new subdomain set up by scripts/install-pro-caddy.sh. Until that backend ships, the app's 'Continue without an account' path keeps working locally.
_comment_ai_secret: INTERACT_PRO_AI_SECRET gates the Advanced OCR + multi-voice TTS Surya backend at pro.interactpak.com/api/ocr/* and /api/tts/*. WITHOUT THIS, the read-aloud feature falls back to local Tesseract OCR and degrades visibly (OCR errors, no word-timing for karaoke highlight). The secret lives on the VPS at /etc/interact/pro-ai.env. To bake it in, run scripts/bake-ai-secret.sh once — it pulls from the VPS and patches dart_defines.json. The build script will refuse to produce an APK when this value is empty.
